_comment: T6 one-shot seed import template. Replace every TODO/PLACEHOLDER value with real content from the Hermes vault notes for these 3 pilot projects. Do not invent statuses, dates or doc inventories - leave a field null/empty if the real value isn't known yet rather than guessing. '_comment' keys are ignored by the importer; they exist to explain fields inline.

people._comment: One entry per real owner/developer/author referenced below who isn't already in the DB (the bootstrap admin, gregory.panagary@cwseychelles.com, already exists from T2 and doesn't need to be listed again).
people.name: TODO: real name

projects.name: TODO: Health Fair - real project name from the vault
projects.owner_email: TODO: real owner's email (must be in 'people' above or already in the DB)
projects.current_next_action: TODO: the real current_next_action from the vault, or null

status_events._comment: At least one real, dated status update establishes data_as_of/freshness. Add one entry per real status update you have, not just the latest.
status_events.summary: TODO: one or two sentences, from the real vault note
status_events.blockers: TODO or null - null if nothing is blocking

documentation_artifacts._comment: One entry per artifact_type that actually exists for this project (per docs/DATA_MODEL.md artifact_type vocab: user_guide, admin_guide, developer_guide, agent_guide, support_runbook, deployment_guide, verification_matrix, exit_md). Omit artifact types that don't exist yet - the deterministic gap list (T5) already treats anything absent here as 'missing'.
documentation_artifacts.title: TODO or null

projects._comment: Project 2 of 3: Pulse Awards or CWSCX (whichever the vault has richer real records for)
projects.name: TODO
